label: ClickUp
description: Connect to ClickUp to read and manage tasks, projects, spaces, and lists across your workspace.

form.title: Connect ClickUp
form.subtitle: Paste your personal API token to give Anton access to your ClickUp workspace.

methods.label: Personal API Token
methods.description: Paste your ClickUp personal API token — found in Settings → Apps. No OAuth setup required; works for any ClickUp plan.
methods.how_to:
## Get your ClickUp Personal API Token

1. Log in to [ClickUp](https://app.clickup.com/).
2. Click your **avatar** in the lower-left corner to open the user menu.
3. Go to **Settings** (the gear icon).
4. In the left sidebar, click **Apps**.
5. Under **API Token**, click **Generate** (or **Regenerate** if you've had one before).
6. Copy the token that appears — it starts with `pk_`.
7. Paste it into the **API Token** field below.

## Notes

- The token grants access as your user account — treat it like a password.
- If you regenerate the token, the old one is immediately invalidated. Update Anton with the new value.
- Workspace admins can restrict API access at the workspace level; contact your admin if the token doesn't work.
- Read more at [ClickUp API docs](https://clickup.com/api).

fields.name: api_token
fields.label: API Token
fields.description: Your personal ClickUp API token. Found in Settings → Apps → API Token.

methods.label: OAuth 2.0 (App Authorization)
methods.description: Authorize via OAuth using your own ClickUp OAuth app. Suitable for teams or automations where a personal token is not appropriate.
methods.how_to:
## Set up ClickUp OAuth 2.0

1. Go to [ClickUp App Developer Portal](https://app.clickup.com/settings/apps) while logged in as a workspace owner or admin.
2. Click **Create an App**.
3. Give the app a name (e.g. `Anton Integration`) and set the **Redirect URI** to `http://127.0.0.1` (or the redirect Anton uses locally).
4. Save the app. Copy the **Client ID** and **Client Secret** shown on the app detail page.
5. Paste both values into the fields below, then click **Submit** to launch the OAuth consent flow in your browser.
6. Approve access for your workspace when prompted.

## Notes

- ClickUp OAuth apps are created at the workspace level — only workspace owners/admins can create them.
- The client secret is shown once; store it securely.
- Token scopes in ClickUp are not granular — the token grants broad workspace access.

fields.name: client_id
fields.label: OAuth Client ID
fields.description: From your ClickUp app settings under Settings → Apps → your created app.

fields.name: client_secret
fields.label: OAuth Client Secret
fields.description: Paired with the Client ID. Shown once when you create the app — store it safely.
